description_long: This is a decorative outdoor lamp post integrated with a wrought iron fence section. The lamp features two lantern-style light fixtures, each with a square, slightly tapered housing and frosted glass panels, mounted atop the vertical posts of the fence. The fence section is constructed from black metal rods with ornamental scrollwork and circular motifs, adding a classic and elegant touch. The lanterns have domed tops with finials, and the overall structure is symmetrical, with the lamps positioned at each end of the fence. The design suggests it is intended for use as a boundary marker or entrance accent in urban parks, gardens, or along sidewalks. The materials and construction indicate durability for outdoor environments.
description: A decorative black metal fence section with two lantern-style lamps mounted on top, featuring frosted glass and ornamental scrollwork. Ideal for outdoor urban settings as a boundary or entrance accent.
description_view_0: Front view showing both lanterns and the full decorative fence with scrollwork and circular motifs.
description_view_1: Side view showing the profile of the lamp post and the stacked lanterns, with the fence appearing as a thin line.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying both lanterns and the ornamental fence details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the profile of the lamp post and lanterns.
